prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-ROUNDMOSQUITONET-WHT Product Type: NETTING_COVER Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Mosquito Net with Mounting Kit Travel Camping Essentials Outdoor Canopy, 94.5 Inches Description: Ensure a restful night’s sleep with ASR Outdoors fine mesh round mosquito net for camping, travel, backpacking and other outdoor activities! Keep mosquitoes and pesky bugs out of your sleeping area with this large mosquito indoor or outdoor canopy; measuring 131 inches in diameter, the mosquito net is suitable for most size beds and mattresses.

Importantly, this fine mesh mosquito net in sheer white colorway features 240 holes per square inch, meaning mosquitoes and bugs are out, but that airflow and circulation can still travel within the mosquito netting. The fine mesh material is made from durable polyester, holding up to lots of wear and tear on your travels, backcountry adventures, road trips and more.

A must have item to include with you for travels abroad where mosquitoes could pass on infection, this lightweight mosquito canopy design means the mosquito netting is easy to pack and carry with luggage, backpacking gear, camping gear, emergency preparedness items, survival kits and more. Plus, the mosquito net for bed comes with a mounting kit (hand tools not include), that includes the following: includes x1 hook, x1 wall anchor, x1pc 39 inch white cord, x1pc 24 inch upper hoop and x1 hanging loop.

Lastly, the mosquito net also comes with a reusable and resealable plastic storage zip lock bag for storage when not in use. Stay bug free and enjoy a peaceful, uninterrupted sleep with this camping essentials backpacking gear mosquito net from ASR Outdoor.

Dimensions: 94.5 x 131.5 inches Search Terms: Mosquito net for bed patio baby camping travel essentials sporting goods outdoor backpacking camping gear bug out bag survival kit travel Africa safari mosquito bite itch relief mosquito netting emergency preparedness items glamping Features: - MOSQUITO NET: Round mosquito net feature 240 holes per square inch fine mesh that will keep bugs out but allow for air flow, circulation and a good nights sleep! The mosquito net comes with mounting kit and reusable zip lock bag for storage when not in use - TRAVEL ESSENTIALS: A must have item to include with you for travels where mosquitoes could pass on infection; lightweight design means the mosquito netting is easy to pack and carry with luggage, backpacking gear, camping gear, emergency preparedness items, survival kits and more - CAMPING GEAR: Camping, backpacking, road tripping and more, pack this mosquito net to keep bugs out and ensure a restful and uninterrupted sleep; diameter is 131.5 inches, making the mosquito canopy or mosquito netting suitable for most bed sizes - MOUNTING KIT INCLUDED: Mosquito net mounting kit includes x1 hook, x1 wall anchor, x1pc 39 inch white cord, x1pc 24 inch upper hoop and x1 hanging loop; hand tools for installation not included - SPECIFICATIONS: Shape: Round; Dimensions: 94.5 x 131.5 inches; Weight: 0.85lbs; Color: White; Material: Polyester === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 131.5in White Round Mosquito Net

anthropic.title_differentiation: 240 Mesh Holes Per Sq In, Includes Mounting Kit, Lightweight Travel Design, Camping And Backpacking Essential

openai.title_differentiation: Fine Mesh 240 Holes Per Square Inch, Mounting Kit Included, Lightweight, Breathable, Reusable Storage Bag
